title: Ranak Devi's Temple
tagline: Ranak Devi's Temple — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Ranakdevi's Temple is a 9th- or 10th-century Hindu temple dedicated to Ranakdevi located in Wadhwan in Surendranagar district of Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Ranakdevi's Temple is a 9th- or 10th-century Hindu temple dedicated to Ranakdevi located in Wadhwan in Surendranagar district of Gujarat, India. It is built in post-Maitraka and early Nagara phase of Māru-Gurjara architecture style.

topPlaces.name: Madhavav
topPlaces.description: Madhavav or Madhav Vav is a stepwell located in Wadhwan town of Surendranagar district, Gujarat, India. It is located in the western side of old town.

topPlaces.name: Wadhwan
topPlaces.description: Wadhwan, also spelled Vadhwan, is a city and a municipality in Surendranagar district in the Indian state of Gujarat. Located on the banks of the Bhogavo River, around 3 km from Surendranagar and 111 km from Ahmedabad, Wadhwan is a known location for its old world royal charm and serene space with a life and culture of its own.

topPlaces.name: Civil Station
topPlaces.description: Civil Station is a residential area situated in the City of Thrissur in Kerala state of India. Civil Station is Ward 54 of Thrissur Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Surendranagar Dudhrej
topPlaces.description: Surendranagar is Municipal Corporation in Surendranagar district in the Indian state of Gujarat.

topPlaces.name: Ratanpar
topPlaces.description: Ratanpar is a Town/Residential Area in the Surendranagar City of the Indian state of Gujarat. Ratanpar's Postal Index Number code is 363020 and the postal head office is Surendranagar.

topPlaces.name: Kherali
topPlaces.description: Kherali is a village in Surendranagar district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It comes on the way from Surendranagar to Limli, and this route leads to Muli.

items.note: Madhavav or Madhav Vav is a stepwell located in Wadhwan town of Surendranagar district, Gujarat, India. It is located in the western side of old town.

Wadhwan, also spelled Vadhwan, is a city and a municipality in Surendranagar district in the Indian state of Gujarat. Located on the banks of the Bhogavo River, around 3 km from Surendranagar and 111 km from Ahmedabad, Wadhwan is a known location for its old world royal charm and serene space with a life and culture of its own.
Civil Station is a residential area situated in the City of Thrissur in Kerala state of India. Civil Station is Ward 54 of Thrissur Municipal Corporation.
Surendranagar is Municipal Corporation in Surendranagar district in the Indian state of Gujarat.
Ratanpar is a Town/Residential Area in the Surendranagar City of the Indian state of Gujarat. Ratanpar's Postal Index Number code is 363020 and the postal head office is Surendranagar.
Kherali is a village in Surendranagar district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It comes on the way from Surendranagar to Limli, and this route leads to Muli.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ranak Devi's Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ranak Devi's Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ranak Devi's Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajkot Airport (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (101 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ranak Devi's Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ranak Devi's Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ranak Devi's Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ranak Devi's Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ranak Devi's Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Madhavav, Wadhwan, Civil Station, Surendranagar Dudhrej, Ratanpar.
